system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Throw against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You summon your inner power and hurl your foe either a great distance or straight into the air. Make a Throw Skill roll against your opponents Parry. On a Success you throw your foe but at a horizontal distance of up to 10 feet plus 5 feet per Rank of Qi (doing Damage plus your Neigong Rank and making them prone). On a Total Success you throw them a distance of 10 feet plus 10 feet per Rank of Qi. Cathartic: You throw your foe straight up in the air, 10 feet per Rank of Qi. This causes normal falling Damage. On a Total Success you throw the person in the air 20 feet per Rank of Qi. You can opt to throw you opponent horizontally for twice the normal distance.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: Target is thrown a great distance or straight into the air; resolve landing, fall, and positioning from the entry
system.catharticEffect: You throw your foe straight up in the air, 10 feet per Rank of Qi. This causes normal falling Damage. On a Total Success you throw the person in the air 20 feet per Rank of Qi. You can opt to throw you opponent horizontally for twice the normal distance.
